text.title: Solo Testimonial Extraction Script Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: qualify-customer
step.action: Confirm NPS ≥7, milestone ≤14d ago, paid, reachable.

step.name: send-3q-outreach
step.action: Send the 3-question email with consent request.

step.name: parse-response
step.action: Extract hesitation, outcome, anti_recommendation, metric verbatim.
step.decision-gate: If metric vague, ask follow-up for a number.

step.name: validate-and-store
step.action: Run `validate-solo-testimonial-extraction-script.py`. Store in case-study queue with 90-day refresh date.
